title: BarkinMad Coins in ZXSpace
description: How BarkinMad Coins work with ZXSpace wave rewards, cosmetic skin unlocks, shared wallet progression, and ZX Series support.
summary: BarkinMad Coins connect ZXSpace wave rewards with shared ZX Series progression and cosmetic unlocks.
heroImageAlt: BarkinMad Coins shared ZX Series documentation asset

images.alt: BarkinMad Coins shared ZX Series reference
images.caption: Shared BarkinMad Coins artwork

sections.heading: What it is
paragraphs: BarkinMad Coins are the shared progression currency model used across supported ZX Series games.
In ZXSpace, coins support long-term progression and cosmetic unlocks such as cannon skins.

sections.heading: How ZXSpace uses coins
paragraphs: ZXSpace gameplay awards coins when waves are completed and updates the shared ZX wallet balance.
Alien and UFO kills award score, while coin rewards are handled separately so score chasing and wallet progression remain distinct.

sections.heading: Cosmetic unlocks
paragraphs: ZXSpace includes unlockable cannon skins. Classic is the default skin, with additional skins unlocked through coins.
Playable skin names include Classic, Red, Neon, Cyanic, Golden, and Obsidian.

faq.question: Do BarkinMad Coins have real-world value?
faq.answer: No. BarkinMad Coins are in-app progression currency and have no cash value.
